Latest report shows Block Inc. holds 28,355 $BTC as of March 2026, valued at $2.2 billion.

The company itself owns 8,997 BTC, ranking it as the 14th largest public Bitcoin treasury, next to Trump Media & Technology Group.

kept.text:
$XYZ – $1.5B bitcoin custodied at @CashApp

59M Cash App users collectively hold 19,357 ($1.5B) bitcoin.

Block used to publish this figure every quarter but stopped after last Q2. At that time, it was 20,500 bitcoin, with the price above $110K.

That implies a decline of only 1,143 bitcoin. Given Block’s push toward self-custody via Bitkey and the significant volatility over the past six months, a reduction of just 1,143 bitcoin held in custody is surprisingly low.

I think it shows a few things:

a) Most Cash App users trust the platform enough not to prioritize self-custody
b) Self-custody appears to be a “nice-to-have,” not a “need-to-have,” which may limit Bitkey’s near-term adoption
c) Cash App bitcoin users skew toward buy-and-hold behavior rather than active trading
d) Bitcoin users are sticky

and......

$1.5B in asset that can be monetized via bitcoin-backed lending

Cash App is doing BNPL on P2P tranfer, but not bitcoin-backed lending?

Leaving money on the table. C'mon let's go.

tweet.text:
PORTFOLIO UPDATE 4/28
$ONDS   $TSLA   $XYZ   $MU   $CAVA   $CAVA   $ARM   $BE   $IBIT   $GEV   $VRT   $VRT   $CAT   $TER   $NBIS   $NBIS

Hey guys! Hope you had a great red day haha! That was the pullback we discussed and prepared for over the last few days. I was and still am a big buyer of that first initial pullback, without knowing how long & deep it will be, I'm really focused on executing the leaders at their 21dma-structure and managing risk overnight if it does not work. Might take a couple of attempts, but I'm looking to push into the margin in the next few days. 

We saw one of the best initial uptrend thrust in history, then everybody want a pullback....well, when we have it, it's time to have an opportunistic mindset! 

NER at 2.3%, and will allow myself to push up to 3% tomorrow if the setups are there. OH at 6%, and Still have a good +13.25% cushion on this market cycle, allowing me to see this pullback as an opportunity and not as a threat. 

Let's see if we can get stabilization after today's initial momentum, but I like both Credit Spreads and VIX action below their declining 21dma-structure, along with ST breadth that really cooled off in the last few days. Let's see! day by day. 

Cheers HAGN!

Today’s action:
NEW: ONDS
ADDED: CAVA, VRT
TRIMMED: 
OUT: LITE, GLW
